title: DEEP-51 operator ACK YAML
description: Schema for ACK YAML emitted by operator_ack_signoff.py and consumed by scripts/ops/production_deploy_go_gate.py --operator-ack <yaml>. All 8 boolean signoff fields plus a DEEP-56 dirty_tree_fingerprint object plus a _meta block carrying yaml_sha256 + git_commit_hash + signed_at + signed_by.

fly_app_confirmed.description: Operator verified flyctl status -a autonomath-api -j -> App.Name=='autonomath-api'.

fly_secrets_names_confirmed.description: Operator verified flyctl secrets list -a autonomath-api -j name set matches docs/_internal/SECRETS_REGISTRY.md required + conditional.

appi_disabled_or_turnstile_secret_confir.description: Either CLOUDFLARE_TURNSTILE_SECRET present in fly secrets OR JPINTEL_APPI_DISABLED=1 set.

target_db_packet_reviewed.description: DEEP-52 verify_migration_targets / migration_inventory exit 0 against dirty migrations.

rollback_reconciliation_packet_ready.description: scripts/migrations/*_rollback.sql packet present and reviewed against DEEP-46.

live_gbiz_ingest_disabled_or_approved.description: Either gBiz token absent in fly secrets OR GBIZINFO_INGEST_APPROVED=1 set, per DEEP-01 / DEEP-54.

dirty_lanes_reviewed.description: Operator reviewed DEEP-50 dirty lane breakdown; DEEP-56 fingerprint matches current tree state.

dirty_tree_fingerprint.description: DEEP-56 fingerprint object. Required fields match production_deploy_go_gate.py REQUIRED_DIRTY_TREE_FINGERPRINT_FIELDS so a stale ACK is detectable.

current_head.description: git rev-parse HEAD at signoff. Null only when git is unavailable.

status_counts.description: Porcelain status counts keyed by XY status.

lane_counts.description: Dirty lane counts using scripts/ops/repo_dirty_lane_report.py taxonomy.

critical_lanes_present.description: Critical dirty lanes present at fingerprint time; produced by the canonical helper.

path_sha256.description: sha256 of sorted raw porcelain lines.

content_sha256.description: sha256 of status/path plus per-file content hashes for dirty entries.

content_hash_skipped_large_files.description: Dirty files too large to content-hash; any entry blocks allow-dirty deploy.

critical_dirty_lanes_reviewed.description: Critical lanes the operator reviewed. Required by the gate when critical_lanes_present is non-empty.

operator_email.description: Email of the human signing off (env OPERATOR_EMAIL, default info@bookyou.net).

signed_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp at YAML emission.

yaml_sha256.description: sha256 of the YAML body excluding this field; pair with git_commit_hash for tamper detection.

signed_by.description: Optional human-readable signer name. Operator_email is the canonical identity.
